description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events for specific paths. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out code with submodules, restore NuGet packages from cache, set up .NET 6.x, run a Cake script with diagnostic verbosity, and create a draft GitHub release with specific files when a tag is pushed. Additionally, push NuGet packages to a source with a provided API key when a tag is pushed.
